name: MetroRide PH
description: MetroRide PH is the elite rail companion for Metro Manila commuters. Get real-time MRT-3, LRT-1 & LRT-2 crowd intelligence, AI-powered route planning, 2026 official fare calculations, beep card management, and a stunning Neon Onyx interface — all in one premium PWA. Zero installs, maximum precision.

screenshots.label: Live Dashboard — Real-time train status across MRT-3, LRT-1 & LRT-2 with Neon Onyx UI
AI Route Planner — Optimal transfers and walking paths calculated in real time
2026 Fare Engine — Official fares for all Metro Manila rail lines
MetroAI — Your intelligent transit assistant for commute guidance and crowd insights
MetroRide PH Desktop — Full-width Neon Onyx elite dashboard for power commuters

shortcuts.name: Fare Calculator
shortcuts.description: Calculate your MRT/LRT fare instantly with the 2026 rail fare engine

shortcuts.name: Route Planner
shortcuts.description: Plan your optimal transit route across all Metro Manila rail lines
